calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joanna Kozubal, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff Marina Krupnik. Limited Scope attorney Kavita Aggarwal, Esq. appeared for and with defendant Jason Salinas.

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or in the Alternative Dismissal with Prejudice as to property at 3342 Anza Street, San Francisco, California. See scanned document for details. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernest A. Halperin, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
